word: The rope was turning by itself!
Pix wrapped the rope around Sprite.
Now it's time for a twirl!
Sprite flew out of the way just in time.
She quickly took off her hoodie.
And she turned it inside out.
His eyes grew wide just looking at it.
meaning: 그것을 보기만 해도 그의 눈이 커졌다.

word: Things are much worse than I thought.
meaning: 상황이 내가 생각했던 것보다 훨씬 더 나빠.

word: Now I know why you were in such a hurry.
meaning: 이제야 네가 왜 그렇게 서둘렀는지 알겠어.

word: Take me to a place where kids like to have fun.
meaning: 아이들이 즐겁게 노는 곳으로 데려가 줘.

word: He pulled out a handful of glittering dust.
meaning: 그는 한 줌의 반짝이는 가루를 꺼냈다.

word: We can go anywhere we want in seconds.
meaning: 우리는 순간적으로 원하는 곳 어디든 갈 수 있어.

word: I'm not going to disappear forever; am I?
She felt her body tingle like tiny feathers were tickling her skin.
meaning: 그녀는 작은 깃털이 피부를 간지럽히는 것처럼 몸이 찌릿찌릿함을 느꼈다.

word: Violet felt water sloshing in her shoes.
meaning: 바이올렛은 신발 안에서 물이 철벅거리는 것을 느꼈다.

word: I'm kind of new at this.
Violet tried to duck behind the fish statue.
meaning: 바이올렛은 물고기 조각상 뒤로 몸을 숙이려고 했다.
